ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., ACTIVE, DISCONTINUED) */,
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package type */,
  "package_drawing" TEXT /* Drawing reference for the package */,
  "pins" INTEGER /* Number of pins the component has */,
  "package_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of packages in inventory */,
  "eco_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the eco plan the component complies with */,
  "lead_finish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead finish */,
  "msl_peak_temp" TEXT /* Moisture Sensitivity Level (MSL) and peak temperature */,
  "op_temp_min" INTEGER /* Minimum operating temperature */,
  "op_temp_max" INTEGER /* Maximum operating temperature */,
  "device_marking" TEXT /* Marking on the device */,
  "samples_available" TEXT /* Indication if samples are available */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component's datasheet */,
  " lifecycle_status" TEXT /* Lifecycle status (e.g., PRODUCTION, OBSOLETE) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_eco_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("eco_plan_id") REFERENCES eco_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_package_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_type_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_lead_finish_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_finish_id") REFERENCES lead_finishes ("finish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package (e.g., SOIC, TO-92) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "dimension_length" REAL /* Length of the package */,
  "dimension_width" REAL /* Width of the package */,
  "dimension_height" REAL /* Height of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_finishes" (
  "finish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead finish */,
  "finish_name" TEXT /* Name of the lead finish (e.g., NIPDAU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lead finish */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Material composition of the lead finish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eco_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eco plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the eco plan (e.g., RoHS & Green) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the eco plan */,
  "compliance_standard" TEXT /* Compliance standard for the eco plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of components ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., PLACED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED) */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer placing the order */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the carrier handling the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., SHIPPED, DELIVERED, LOST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement, production, quality control) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being supplied */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_suppliers_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being priced */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the component */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price takes effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_prices_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being transacted */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., STOCK_IN, STOCK_OUT) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of components transacted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
